use_cases: Product image galleries on e-commerce sites for browsing shoe or fashion collections
Portfolio showcases where users swipe through visual work samples
Mobile-friendly image stacks for product detail pages requiring vertical exploration
ai_summary: A vertical image stack carousel component with drag/swipe navigation for browsing through stacked images. Uses framer-motion for smooth transitions and includes navigation cooldown logic to prevent rapid interactions. Ideal for displaying sequential product images in e-commerce applications or visual galleries where users need to swipe through content vertically.
